title: [520mAh] Battery for Samsung Gear S3 Frontier, Replacement Batteries for Samsung Gear S3 Classic SM-R770 R760 R765 EB-BR760ABE GH43-04699A with Professional Repair Tools
features: 【COMPATIBLE MODEL】: This battery is only for Samsung Gear S3 Frontier (SM-R760) and Gear S3 Classic R770, R760, R770, BR760, R765. NOTE: Please check your watch model on the back of your watch before purchasing.

【520mAh BATTERIES】: 520mAh extended capacity battery for Samsung Gear S3 Frontier with Professional Repair Tools Kits, battery with more power than the original/other battery. The capacity of the 2025 brand new 0-cycle battery cells is upgraded to store more energy, bring more standby time, extend battery life and reduce your charging times.

【SAFETY GUARANTEE】: EVELLHPP gear s3 frontier watch battery has a strict quality control standards and passed the CE and ROHS certified, over-temperature protection, over-charge protection, overload protection, short-circuit protection and safety protection.

【HOW TO USE】: When using galaxy gear s3 battery, please notice that use up all the power of battery for the first three times before charging, and then take a full charge, thus the extended battery can be reached the optimum effect of using. Full performance and longevity is only achieved after 3 to 5 complete charge and discharge cycles.

【WORRY-FREE GUARANTEE】: If you have any questions about this upgraded gear s3 frontier replacement battery, please feel free to contact EVELLHPP team directly, we will try our best to serve you. take care of all quality-related questions with a refund or replacement.
